[et_pb_section fb_built=”1″ fullwidth=”on” _builder_version=”4.16″ bottom_divider_style=”wave2″ bottom_divider_color=”#f5e9ad” bottom_divider_height=”50px” global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_fullwidth_code admin_label=”Fullwidth Code” _builder_version=”4.16″ _module_preset=”default” global_colors_info=”{}”]In your html page, add the snippet and call gtag_report_conversion when someone clicks on the chosen link or button. –>[/et_pb_fullwidth_code][et_pb_fullwidth_header title=”Buffet Catering Menu” text_orientation=”center” _builder_version=”4.16″ background_color=”rgba(0,0,0,0.5)” background_image=”https://www.houseofcatering.com.sg/wp-content/uploads/2019/09/Buffet-Banner.jpg” background_blend=”overlay” custom_padding=”||88px|||” title_text_shadow_style=”preset1″ title_text_shadow_color=”#e02b20″ global_colors_info=”{}”][/et_pb_fullwidth_header][/et_pb_section][et_pb_section fb_built=”1″ _builder_version=”4.16″ background_color=”#f5e9ad” global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_row _builder_version=”4.16″ global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_column type=”4_4″ _builder_version=”4.16″ global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_text _builder_version=”4.16″ global_colors_info=”{}”]

Buffet Catering Services

As one of the leading buffet caterers in Singapore, we have our own team of highly trained chefs to ensure each dish is cooked to perfection while keeping our pledge of no MSG, Preservatives, less salt and 100% vegetable oil. With this mission and vision, we always provide the best buffet catering in Singapore.

Buffet Catering for Corporate & Private Events

Whether you are planning to organise a corporate event such as a meeting and company party, or a private event such as causal family gathering, wedding and birthday party, the catering of your event definitely can make your event even more perfect and memorable for your guests. So you can be assured that our buffet quality must match with your expectation.

Menus for Buffet in Singapore

We have 3 buffet menus: Economic, Regular & Fabulous Buffet Menu, to ensure you get the ideal buffet catering service. These menus can accommodate 25 and above pax of your event. You will be spoiled with choices as you have more than 100 choices of dish to choose from. However, in case you have special requirements or additional customization on your menus, we are also pleased to help and provide you the most ideal buffet menu.

Please browse our buffet catering menu below and feel free to contact us at 68159119 or email us at enquiry@houseofcatering.com.sg and order our high quality buffet catering services.

[/et_pb_text][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][/et_pb_section][et_pb_section fb_built=”1″ _builder_version=”4.16″ background_color=”#f5e9ad” custom_padding=”0px||0px|||” global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_row column_structure=”1_3,1_3,1_3″ use_custom_gutter=”on” make_equal=”on” _builder_version=”4.16″ width=”100%” custom_margin=”-4px|auto||auto||” custom_padding=”0px|||||” global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_column type=”1_3″ _builder_version=”4.16″ global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_blurb title=”Economic Buffet Menu” url=”https://www.houseofcatering.com.sg/economic-menu/” image=”https://www.houseofcatering.com.sg/wp-content/uploads/2019/09/HOC-Buffet.jpg” _builder_version=”4.16″ text_orientation=”center” global_colors_info=”{}”]

$15.50/pax (7 Dishes + Beverage) Min. 40 pax
Additional dish ordered will be charged at $2.50 per dish per pax

 

[/et_pb_blurb][/et_pb_column][et_pb_column type=”1_3″ _builder_version=”4.16″ global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_blurb title=”Regular Buffet Menu” url=”https://www.houseofcatering.com.sg/regular-menu/” image=”https://www.houseofcatering.com.sg/wp-content/uploads/2019/09/HOC-Buffet-1.jpg” _builder_version=”4.16″ text_orientation=”center” global_colors_info=”{}”]

$16.50/pax (8 Dishes + Beverage) Min. 30 pax
Additional dish ordered will be charged at $2.50 per dish per pax

 

[/et_pb_blurb][/et_pb_column][et_pb_column type=”1_3″ _builder_version=”4.16″ global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_blurb title=”Fabulous Buffet Menu” url=”https://www.houseofcatering.com.sg/fabulous-menu/” image=”https://www.houseofcatering.com.sg/wp-content/uploads/2019/09/HOC-Buffet-2.jpg” _builder_version=”4.16″ text_orientation=”center” global_colors_info=”{}”]

$18.50/pax (9 Dishes + Beverage) Min. 25 pax
Additional dish ordered will be charged at $2.50 per dish per pax

 

[/et_pb_blurb][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][/et_pb_section]
